(1) If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1.
(2) John is a father of Mike and Mickey.
(3) Luke is a father of John.
(4) If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1.
(5) If X1 is male and X1 is a grandchild of Y1, X1 is a grandson of Y1.
(6) Mike or Mickey is not female.
(7) Any person is male or female.
(8) Who is a grandson of Luke?

(1) If some X is father of some Y and some E1 is father of X then E1 is grandfather of Y  [sentence 1]
(2) John is father of Mickey  [sentence 2]
(3) If some X is father of John then X is grandfather of Mickey  [from steps 1, 2]
(4) Luke is father of John  [sentence 3]
(5) Luke is grandfather of Mickey  [from steps 3, 4]
(6) If some X is grandfather of some Y then Y is grandchild of X  [sentence 4]
(7) Mickey is grandchild of Luke  [from steps 5, 6]
(8) If some X is grandchild of some Y and X is male then X is grandson of Y  [sentence 5]
(9) If Mickey is male then Mickey is grandson of Luke  [from steps 7, 8]
(10) If some X is grandson of Luke then X is an answer  [from question]
(11) If Mickey is male then Mickey is an answer  [from steps 9, 10]
(12) If some X is a person then X is male or X is female  [sentence 7]
